parents.subject: LU-12068 tests: add debug for sanity-lfsck test_6b

commit.subject: ATM-1283 tests: tentative patch for Lustre security tests
commit.message:
ATM-1283 tests: tentative patch for Lustre security tests

Try to fix or debug sanity so that it can pass
with SELinux and Shared-Keys enabled.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Test-Parameters: clientselinux testlist=sanity,recovery-small,sanity-selinux
Test-Parameters: envdefinitions=SHARED_KEY=true testlist=sanity,recovery-small,sanity-sec
Test-Parameters: envdefinitions=SHARED_KEY=true clientselinux testlist=sanity,recovery-small,sanity-selinux,sanity-sec
Signed-off-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Change-Id: Ia0cfd0b0f1471b02e462621a8073ebcab52caa79
